allow: PowerShell(cd "d:\\Application Dev\\SEL Live" && npx tsc --noEmit 2>&1 | Where-Object { $_ -match "AllRequisitionsTab2" } | Select-Object -First 40)
PowerShell(cd "d:\\Application Dev\\SEL Live" && npx tsc --noEmit 2>&1 | Select-String "AllRequisitionsTab2" | ForEach-Object { $_.Line })
PowerShell(cd "d:\\Application Dev\\SEL Live" && \(npx tsc --noEmit 2>&1\) -join "`n" | Select-String "AllRequisitionsTab2" -AllMatches | Select-Object -ExpandProperty Line | Select-Object -First 40)
